channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Goodbye Nest Mini: Google Home Speaker Launches
item.description: Google Home Speaker is set to launch, marking the end of the Nest Mini era. This transition hints at a new direction for Google's smart speaker lineup.

item.title: Swiffer Secrets: How to Use It Right
item.description: Using a Swiffer correctly can transform your cleaning routine. With the right technique, mopping becomes quick and efficient, leaving floors spotless in minutes.

item.title: Nintendo Games Sale: Lowest Prices on Amazon
item.description: A new sale on Amazon offers significant discounts on Nintendo Switch games, including record-low prices for popular titles like Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom.

item.title: Square Enix's Retro RPG Strategy Shines
item.description: Square Enix has successfully created a brand for retro-style RPGs, establishing a unique aesthetic that resonates with fans and drives sales.

item.title: Sony's PS5 Strategy: Fewer Units, Lower Prices
item.description: Sony may address hardware pricing issues by reducing PS5 production. This approach aims to stabilize costs amid rising hardware expenses.

item.title: Unlock Hidden Android Features for Better Use
item.description: Many useful Android features are hidden within menus. Discovering these can significantly enhance user experience and productivity.

item.title: Android 17 Faces Touchscreen Issues on Pixels
item.description: Users report touchscreen problems after updating to Android 17, including unresponsive areas and scrolling issues on Pixel devices.

item.title: New Xbox Handheld Logo Surfaces Online
item.description: Microsoft introduces a new Xbox Handheld logo on game pages, hinting at a potential handheld gaming device in development.

item.title: Google's Gemini Improves Linux Boot Times
item.description: Google's Gemini technology helps reduce boot times on modern ASUS laptops, addressing performance issues for users with high-end specs.

item.title: Best NAS Devices for Home Backup Solutions
item.description: Network-attached storage (NAS) devices offer efficient backup and sharing solutions for home users. Here are the top picks after thorough testing.

item.title: GTA 6 Pricing Leaks Ahead of Pre-Orders
item.description: Leaked SKUs suggest GTA 6 will be priced at €90 for the base edition and €119.99 for the premium version, just before pre-orders begin.

item.title: Avoid Cloud Storage Limits with Google Photos
item.description: Changing a specific setting in Google Photos can prevent hitting cloud storage limits, enhancing user experience significantly.

item.title: Buying Used iPhones: A Smart Choice
item.description: With rising prices, purchasing used iPhones is increasingly sensible. They offer longevity and cost savings, making them a viable option for consumers.

item.title: Microsoft Office Set for Life Offer
item.description: Get lifetime access to Microsoft Office for just $89.97, a cost-effective alternative to Microsoft 365 subscriptions.

item.title: My Hero Academia: All's Justice Coming to Switch 2
item.description: Bandai Namco announces the release of My Hero Academia: All's Justice for Switch 2, set to launch this September, expanding the game's reach.
